text:
Perfect! Relay supports these VM types:
- `evm` - Ethereum Virtual Machine (most chains)
- `svm` - Solana Virtual Machine
- `bvm` - Bitcoin Virtual Machine
- `hypevm` - Hyperliquid EVM
- `tvm` - Tron Virtual Machine

Now let me rewrite the `loadBatchWalletTokens` function to support all VM types:
